label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: MAJKA Rafał soloed to victory from 87.3km out after breaking from elite 25-rider group, holding off ZWIEHOFF by 1:27.
tactical_patterns: MAJKA Rafał rejected ARU Fabio's company from earlier split, choosing solo effort over collaboration 87.3km out.
Jumbo-Visma planted multiple riders including KUSS Sepp in early break and ZWIEHOFF in chase group guaranteeing result.
YATES Adam counterattacked from favorites group on final categorized climb gaining 15 seconds without organized chase response.
Movistar missing initial 25-rider elite break forced peloton fracture chasing back, revealing cost of early positioning failure.

rider_signals.MAJKA Rafał: positive: chose solo over collaboration with ARU 87km out, maintained gap on descents showing superior race management
rider_signals.ZWIEHOFF Ben: positive: second place from Jumbo-Visma's multi-pronged breakaway strategy, confirmed team depth in stage hunting
rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: opportunistically gained 15 seconds on GC group on category three climb without provoking organized response
rider_signals.CORT Magnus: neutral: present in quality 25-rider break but faded as climbing selection intensified despite two prior stage wins
rider_signals.VERONA Carlos: neutral: made secondary eight-rider chase group but couldn't bridge to MAJKA or match ZWIEHOFF's finishing speed
